text: Shared-memory day cache: predictors-ON N=8 went from 128 GB → OOM to 30 GB (~4× cut), with N=12 now fitting at 36 GB.
Recalibrated multiprocess speedup on the static_obs path: K=8 6.0×, K=12 8.0×, K=16 9.1×, K=20 9.4× (peak).

locator.quote: arrays (predictors baked in) as a per-day

text: The master bakes each day's static_obs float32 arrays (predictors baked in) as a per-day .npy memmap; workers np.load(mmap_mode='r') so the OS page cache holds one copy.
